title: Tick Control in Plainview, Long Island | $125 - $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Plainview, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Plainview's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks make it an ideal environment for ticks to thrive, putting your family and pets at risk of Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Plainview, targeting these dangerous pests where they live and breed. Our proven treatment methods create a protective barrier around your property, allowing you to enjoy your outdoor spaces safely.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Long Island communities like Plainview for years with specialized tick control treatments designed for our region's unique pest challenges. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and proven application techniques to eliminate ticks at every life stage while keeping your family and pets safe.
localContext: Plainview's suburban homes with their spacious yards, proximity to Manetto Hills Park, and wooded areas create perfect habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. The neighborhood's mature landscaping and connection to green spaces along the Bethpage Bikeway corridor mean vigilant tick control is essential for outdoor enjoyment throughout the spring, summer, and fall months.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Plainview, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Plainview typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important in our Long Island climate.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Plainview?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Plainview range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the extent of tick infestation, and the treatment plan needed. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and until the treatment has dried, typically 2-4 hours, after which your yard is safe to enjoy.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our barrier sprays target ticks in vegetation, leaf litter, and common harborage areas. For best results, we recommend a series of treatments spaced 4-6 weeks apart during peak tick season to maintain continuous protection.
